companyNameJapanese: 粤芯半導体技術股份有限公司
description: Greater Bay Area's (Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao) only 12-inch wafer foundry in full production. Founded 2017 in Guangzhou, Guangdong. Specializes in analog chips, power management ICs, and power discrete devices. Three phases operational: Phase 1 (2019, 40K wafers/month), Phase 2 (2022, +20K wafers/month), Phase 3 (2024 end). Technology nodes: 180nm to 55nm. IPO application accepted by Shenzhen ChiNext Dec 2025, targeting 7.5B CNY fundraise. Latest valuation: 25.3B CNY.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - probing, dicing, CMP equipment for 12-inch fab
_externalRelationships.notes: Valuation 25.3B CNY (~531B JPY). Not yet listed - ChiNext IPO accepted Dec 2025, targeting 7.5B CNY raise (3.5B for Phase 3 fab, 2.5B for R&D platform, 1.5B working capital). Revenue FY2024: 1.681B CNY. Cumulative losses of 8.936B CNY (2022-2025H1), profitability expected 2029. No controlling shareholder - largest holder 16.88%. Investors include Guangdong Semi Fund, GAC Capital, SAIC, BAIC (auto industry). Product yield >97%. Key customer for ACCRETECH probing and dicing equipment as a growing 12-inch foundry. Focused on automotive, industrial, and consumer analog/power chips.

_metadata.dataSource: ESMChina, 21Jingji, 36Kr, Baike Baidu, company website, Chinese language sources
